description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:18.09 image with the docker:18.09-dind service, set DOCKER_DRIVER and SHARED_PATH variables, and define a cache keyed as docker_mimir_data that caches the shared/ directory. Add two jobs in the default test stage, geocoder-tester-cosmogony and geocoder-tester-without-cosmogony, both limited to the web pipeline and tagged geocoder-tester. Each job runs the shared before_script: echo $PR_NUMBER, export OSM_DIR=$SHARED_PATH/osm ADDR_DIR=$SHARED_PATH/addresses, ls -Rlh $SHARED_PATH || true, apk add --no-cache python3-dev py3-pip git bash build-base libffi-dev openssl-dev, and ./init.sh. The geocoder-tester-cosmogony job then cd's into docker_mimir and executes inv -f settings_france_with_cosmogony.yml load-in-docker-and-test --files docker-compose.build.yml, followed by after_script steps pipenv install --system --deploy and pipenv run inv publish-results --scenario=cosmogony --pr-number=$PR_NUMBER --github-token=$GITHUB_TOKEN. The geocoder-tester-without-cosmogony job runs inv -f settings_france_without_cosmogony.yml load-in-docker-and-test --files docker-compose.build.yml, then pipenv install --system --deploy and pipenv run inv publish-results --scenario=no_cosmogony --pr-number=$PR_NUMBER --github-token=$GITHUB_TOKEN, and both jobs archive the docker_mimir/results directory as an artifact that expires in two weeks.
